name: Budget
preprompt: You are the budget component. You track committed and discretionary spend, surface upcoming decisions, and answer affordability questions from other components.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. External: institutional finance ledger (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: AUD 90k Pilbara grant. AUD 52k committed (fieldwork + contract O-isotope batch). AUD 12k held for contract LA-ICP-MS fallback. Discretionary headroom ~AUD 26k.

toc.title: Committed spend
toc.descriptor: AUD 52,000 on contracts and standing fieldwork commitments.

toc.title: LA-ICP-MS fallback reserve
toc.descriptor: AUD 12,000 held; releases if institutional calibration slips past 2026-05-20.
